description: Perform a compressibility study on a NACA 0012 airfoil in QBlade to analyze the effect of Mach number on performance. Generate a NACA 0012 airfoil (100 panels) and conduct three XFoil polar analyses using a Reynolds Number of 3,000,000 and NCrit of 9. The three polars must vary only by Mach number: 0.0, 0.3, and 0.5. For each analysis, simulate an Angle of Attack (AoA) range from -5 to 15 degrees with a 0.5-degree step. Save the project as 'mach_study.wpa' in '/home/ga/Documents/projects/'.
